name: Re;zero RPG
description:
LIVE as Subaru! The most accurate Re:Zero RPG experience awaits.

Step into the shoes of Subaru Natsuki, the ordinary boy cursed with Return by Death. Relive the unforgiving cycle of pain, betrayal, and despair as you navigate the dark, medieval world of Re:Zero - Starting Life in Another World. Every choice matters, and every death rewinds time—but at a cost.

Protect those you care about, uncover the truth behind every tragedy, and face relentless foes that push you to your limits. How many times can you endure death before you break?

Features:

The most true-to-anime Re:Zero RPG adventure. Accurate!

Gut-wrenching decisions and unpredictable outcomes.

Fearsome monsters, deadly bosses, and a world full of betrayal.

Live, suffer, and fight through Subaru’s harrowing journey.

Tags: anime, Re:Zero, Re zero, RPG, dark fantasy, death loop, survival, despair.
creator: Sdkx29
